scripts.db:migrate: node -r dotenv/config node_modules/.bin/node-pg-migrate up --migration-file-language sql --migrations-dir migrations
scripts.db:down: node -r dotenv/config node_modules/.bin/node-pg-migrate down --migration-file-language sql --migrations-dir migrations
scripts.db:create: node -r dotenv/config node_modules/.bin/node-pg-migrate create --migration-file-language sql --migrations-dir migrations
